The company invests hugely in new research for the international universities like Stanford University USA, Auckland University New Zealand, Melbourne University Australia, and IIT India. Our Research and Development center is integrated with world class technology and advanced machinery, they are fully equipped with high class automated Swiss machinery.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

--- Our Brands ---
[vc_row][vc_column width=1/3] Fylla Reduced operative time with 8th Generation dual cure resin cement that performs both luting and lining. [/vc_column][vc_column width=1/3] Effect Very fine texture, cost effective scan able impressions similar to ones with putty and light body. [/vc_column][vc_column width=1/3] N+ Newest generation Cord and Touch Display, lasts long and user friendly.

The first manufacturing unit is in Australia which involves in the production of dental consumables, surgical and specialization products and the second one is in Dublin, Ireland which produces majorly medical and dental devices. Our Australian manufacturing unit was built in the year 1973 in Adelaide, South Australia with the base constructed in 30 hectors of industrial land area. The Ireland manufacturing unit which is located in Dublin built in 22 hectors of land area.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

--- Our Clients ---
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_gallery type=image_grid images=12409,12410,12411,12412,12413,12414,12415,12416,12474,12475,12476,12477,12478,12479,12487,12488,12489 img_size=250250 css_animation=fadeInUp el_class=mi-client][/vc_column][/vc_row]

--- About Us ---
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text]Mothers International is a group of companies, its actual root of the company begins in the year 1973 as Mothers Dental company in Australia, which gives dental care and solutions world wide.

Research Mothers International embraces an indigenous Research unit that scrutinizes the emerging dental praxis, speculating the enhanced requisites of the user. Development As a patriarch of quality products, we invest generous resources annually to bolster the Research and Development team to eventuate the reforming beliefs.

Our manufacturing unit is integrated with world-class machinery which is completely digitalized and fully automated. Both manufacturing units are integrated with Swiss made CNC Rollamatic machines and powered with German laser technology. Raw Materials Our complete series of raw material selection is from Germany and the United States of America. Alloys like NiTi, Nickel, Titanium, Aluminum, Monel alloy U400 and Copper are from Germany.

All our products are the outcome of the world’s best engineers which is empowered by the new advanced engineered technology. Research and Development The company focused and invest hugely in our international Research and Development centres based in Australia and Ireland. Our Research and Development team are integrated with medical metallurgist, medical engineers, biomedical engineers, microbiologist, dental engineers along with dental and medical specialist.

Experts While our team of Scientists and Clinicians formulate the biocompatible material, the experienced Engineers and dental technicians enforce the advancements in operating technologies to augment clinical efficiency. Also, our distinguished spokesmen propagate the technological uniqueness across the diverse dental terrain.

Dental and Medical consumables raw materials are obtained from USA selected through FDA certified body. Engineers Engineers are the main attraction in our production phase, our engineers are world class technicians with highly skilled and qualified across the globe from the universities like Harvard University USA, Stanford University USA, Melbourne University Australia, IIT India.

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column width=1/4][vc_single_image image=12311][/vc_column][vc_column width=3/4][vc_column_text]Reduced operative time with 8th Generation dual cure resin cement that performs both luting and lining.

It supplies around 500,000 dentist worldwide who treat over 5,000,000 patients every day, which is over a billion patients a year. Our operations over 26 countries worldwide and sales presence in around 67 countries which holds 2,500+ employees across the globe. Mothers International is globally acknowledged and accredited for manufacturing authentic research based quality dental products, on par with the forerunners of Dental Biz.

Contemplating the futuristic preferment Mothers International is devoted to catering remarkable dental experience to our ultimate consumer. Our Continental business is actualized by the Research and Development, production system and Human Resources in tandem. Hi Tech machinery ensuing international precepts effectuate the rendition of world class standard dental produce.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

--- Product Service ---
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text] Mothers International Service Team Reckoning overall customer satisfaction as the chief concern, we at Mothers International have assigned a team of specialists and dental experts to provide the best and most reliable technical support with their knowledge and experience.

Mothers International integrates adept workforce, proficient engineers and technical staff with scholarly expertise in dental and medical field. Our HR squad embodies highly interactive, responsive and supportive productions, sales and customer care personnel, who cater to the discrete necessities of our consumers. Our Mission is to cater to global dental demands with premium dental products and services, accessible universally.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

--- Product Orders ---

Chloé Durand, France I am a dentist from Paris France. Quite satisfied with FARCI composite from Mothers International. I love the product because of its strength, consistency and especially low film thickness of this product. It reduces the setting time because of its high photoinitiator. I love the products from Mothers International. Dr.

Lukas Novák, Prague I have been using HELIX D8 from Mothers the handling of the handpiece is compact and convenient, the unique design makes it lightweight while handling. The quality is amazing with its titanium body. Love to give excellent in satisfactory to Mothers International. Dr. Sophia Hill, Australia Every new innovation of Mothers Australia has made its own footprint in dentistry and dentist because of its highest quality and innovation.

Effect is my favorite choice of product from Mothers group because the impression of the product meets its demand. Thanks to mothers international, keep innovating new range of products and dentistry. Dr. Hannah Thompson, United Kingdom FYLLA is the best choice for luting, FYLLA saves time by cutting down 3 steps into a single step. High Retention of this product gives more comfort to the dentist. DATE: Greater New York Dental Meeting 1 st to 4 th December 2019

--- AEEDC 2019, DUBAI ---
AEEDC Dubai is the largest dental event in the MENASA region. The event is now stepping into its 24th edition with the theme “Education & Innovation Transfer. More than 150 international and regional speakers will deliver lectures and hands-on workshop on various aspects of dentistry. The exhibition will display the latest technologies and products by more than 2484 exhibiting companies.

Close to 10,000 participants from 47 countries could try out products offered by 200 exhibitors and attended more than 200 educational events. DATE: CEDE (Central European Dental Exhibition) 19 th to 21 st September 2019

--- GREATER NY DENTAL MEETING, 2019 ---
The Greater New York Dental Meeting will Featuring some of the most highly regarded educators in the field of Dentistry.

At this prestigious event products from over 1000 brands, which are used in dental clinics and dental surgeries, are demonstrated by leading dentists, manufacturers of dental material and many more. DATE: Dental Salon 22nd to 25th April 2019

--- IDEX 2019, TURKEY ---
IDEX Istanbul, one of the worlds three biggest trade fairs in the oral and dental health field and the only international event of the Turkish dental industry, will be held on 11-14 April 2019 at CNR EXPO Yeşilköy.

We urge you not only to partake in the many educational programs but also to visit our Exhibitors on our expansive exhibit floor. It is an integral part of the Dental Meeting experience for attendees to interact with the Exhibitors who enhance our Meeting in countless ways. They are there to demonstrate and teach you about new products and technology from around the world. You can touch, use and compare the newest materials and technology in Dentistry today.

IDEX will support the industry with a size of US$ 500 million to exceed its 2023 target of US$1 billion. 1100 brands from over 300 companies are expected to participate in the expo. DATE: IDEX 11th to 14th April 2019

--- CEDE 2019, POLAND ---
Never before in its history has CEDE put so much emphasis on the importance of integration between the worlds of business and science in the dental industry.

--- IDEM SINGAPORE, 2019 ---
IDEM is the premier launchpad into the Asia-Pacific market for dental manufacturers and distributors coveting to take that first step into Asia.

Riding on its continuous success since 2000, IDEM enters its eleventh edition from 24 – 26 April 2020 and will cement its position as the leading dental exhibition and conference in the Asia Pacific by providing companies and buyers one central meeting point to do business and explore new partnerships with key players from the Asia Pacific.

DATE: IDEM 24th to 26th April 2020

--- DENTAL SALON 2019, RUSSIA ---
At IEC Crocus Expo Center of Moscow one of the largest international exhibitions of the dental industry of Russia and the CIS countries takes place. At the Dental Salon about 500 exhibitors present the latest trends and technologies relating to dentistry and dental technology and equipment to a qualified audience of approximately 30,000 visitors in two exhibition halls.

DATE: AEEDC 5 TH TO 7 TH February 2019

--- IDS 2019, GERMANY ---
Forward-looking innovations, countless new products, exciting live demonstrations and practical hands-on the unique show for the entire dental industry presents the most important concepts and technologies for the practices and laboratories of today and tomorrow. DATE: IDS 12 th to 16 th March 2019
